g.text: — Shaded boxes are cached. Demo generation is cached for the session; live fetches for an hour.

text.style: font-size: 6.6px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #445066

g.text: — Tabs render and never compute. Every executive number is defined exactly once, in kpi.py.

text.style: font-size: 6.6px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #445066

g.text: — A binding that fails contributes zero rows and a reason, and the page still renders.

text.style: font-size: 6px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #7a8599

g.text: Agent tools read the same DataContext the dashboards read, so the Copilot cannot quote a number the UI disagrees with.
